Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time until Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER is performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in successful payment paths
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after the case enters the approval stage
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without budget owner involvement
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants leading to Payment Handled versus variants ending in rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER when it directly precedes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to be completed after Request Payment is eventually triggered in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases where Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurred earlier in the trace
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in domestic declaration cases (inferred via case:Amount or context from description)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in high-frequency variants (e.g., top 3 most frequent variants containing this activity)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to average time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'
